targets.rawSQL:
WITH aligned AS (
  SELECT
    r.slug,
    r.micro_district,
    r.square,
    r.rooms,
    r.floor,
    r.floors,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', COALESCE(f.effective_from, p.effective_from)) AS dt,
    f.sqm_price              AS fact_sqm_price,
    p.sqm_price              AS predicted_sqm_price,
    f.sqm_price_change       AS sqm_price_change,
    f.sqm_price / p.sqm_price AS ratio
  FROM realty_dim r
  LEFT JOIN realty_price_fact f
    ON r.slug = f.slug
  LEFT JOIN prediction_price_fact p
    ON r.slug = p.slug
   AND DATE_TRUNC('day', f.effective_from) = DATE_TRUNC('day', p.effective_from)
)
SELECT
  slug,
  micro_district,
  square,
  rooms,
  floor,
  floors,
  dt,
  ROUND(fact_sqm_price) AS fact_sqm_price,
  ROUND(predicted_sqm_price) AS predicted_sqm_price,
  ROUND(ratio, 2) AS ratio,
  ROUND(sqm_price_change, 3) AS sqm_price_change
FROM aligned
ORDER BY slug, dt;
select effective_from, total_price FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
select effective_from, object_count FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
select effective_from, total_square FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
select effective_from, total_price_change FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
select effective_from, object_count_change FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
select effective_from, total_square_change FROM market_summary WHERE slug = '$district';
